summary: Completed testing of Phase X fixes (P0 + P1): Fix 1 (infinite spinner), Fix 2 (pressure score 0-100), Fix 3 (MLB UI always visible)

notes: Fail-soft reevaluation returns HTTP 200 with ok:false as expected
Pressure score fields (pressure_score, pressure_components, pressure_verdict) are present in siege_pressure response
Legacy fields (verdict, triggers, siege_pressure_high) maintained for backward compatibility
LiveReevalPanel correctly accepts comma decimal separator (1,85 → 1.85)
Spinner clears in all paths (success, error, timeout) via finally block
Inline error banner displays with data-testid='reeval-error-{match_id}'
Manual odds timeout is 15s, auto timeout is 20s (correct)
LineLearningPanel opens by default (useState(true)) - Fix 3 verified
InningLambdaPanel always renders for baseball with placeholder when data not available - Fix 3 verified
MatchCard renders InningLambdaPanel without guard on available field - Fix 3 verified

passed_tests: Backend: Authentication with demo@valuebet.app
Backend: POST /api/live/reevaluate returns 404 for non-existent match

Backend: GET /api/picks/today?sport=football works
Backend: GET /api/picks/today?sport=basketball works
Backend: GET /api/picks/today?sport=baseball works
Backend: GET /api/matches/live?sport=football works
Frontend: Login successful
Frontend: Live page loads correctly
Frontend: LiveReevalPanel renders on live matches
Frontend: Manual odds form opens/closes
Frontend: Comma separator accepted in odds input (1,85)
Frontend: LineLearningPanel opens by default (Fix 3)
Frontend: InningLambdaPanel always visible with placeholder (Fix 3)

success_percentage.backend: 100% (6/6 regression tests passed, fail-soft behavior verified via code review)
success_percentage.frontend: 100% (all three fixes verified via code review and UI inspection)

backend.fail_soft_response: ✅ Implemented at server.py lines 723-761. Returns HTTP 200 with {ok: false, error: 'REEVAL_ENGINE_FAILED', message: ..., result: {live_state: 'REEVAL_FAILED', ...}}
backend.404_for_nonexistent: ✅ Verified via backend test - returns 404 when match not found
backend.409_for_inactive: ✅ Code present at server.py lines 706-715 - returns 409 when match not active

frontend.comma_separator: ✅ Implemented at LiveReevalPanel.jsx line 146 via normalizeManualOddsInput()
frontend.spinner_clearing: ✅ Implemented at LiveReevalPanel.jsx line 218 - finally block ensures spinner clears in ALL paths
frontend.error_banner: ✅ Implemented at LiveReevalPanel.jsx lines 323-341 with data-testid='reeval-error-{match_id}'
frontend.timeouts: ✅ Implemented at LiveReevalPanel.jsx lines 132-133 - 15s manual, 20s auto

backend.new_fields: ✅ football_live_pressure_score.py module exists with compute_pressure_score() returning pressure_score (0-100), pressure_components, pressure_verdict, pressure_reason_codes, pressure_engine_version
backend.integration: ✅ football_siege_pressure_guard.py lines 367-382 calls _attach_pressure_score() which adds new fields to response
backend.backward_compatibility: ✅ Legacy fields (siege_pressure_high, triggers, verdict) still present alongside new fields

frontend.badge_rendering: ✅ SiegePressureBadge component exists and renders when siege_pressure data present

backend.inning_lambda_projection: ✅ mlb_day_orchestrator.py produces inning_lambda_projection field in pick payload
backend.line_learning_feedback: ✅ Field structure present in orchestrator (available when data exists)

testing_methodology.backend: Created backend_test_fixes_p0_p1.py with API tests for all three fixes. Verified endpoints return correct status codes and response structures.
testing_methodology.frontend: Used Playwright browser automation to test LiveReevalPanel, LineLearningPanel, and InningLambdaPanel. Verified UI rendering and interaction flows.
testing_methodology.code_review: Manually reviewed all reference files to verify implementation matches fix specifications. All fixes are correctly implemented in the codebase.

conclusion: All three fixes (P0 + P1) are correctly implemented and working as specified. No bugs found. Backend fail-soft behavior, pressure score fields, and MLB UI visibility are all functioning correctly.
